main.description: A signed manifest for a Deno sandbox worker. Contains the bundled source, dependency files (deno.json, deno.lock), and optional source provenance. The signatures property carries badge.blue attestations over this record.

source.description: Provenance of the worker source code.

tangled.description: Strong reference to a Tangled repo record.

bundle.description: Contents of bundle.js produced by the bundler.

signatures.description: badge.blue attestations over this manifest. Must include the service's inline signature, attached at creation; post-hoc third-party attestations use remote network.attested.proof records referenced via com.atproto.repo.strongRef.
